name: clipart
text:
SVG Clipart Registry — for collages

General clipart libraries

Source URL License
Openclipart openclipart.org CC0 (public domain)
SVG Repo svgrepo.com Mostly CC0/MIT, ~500k vectors
Public Domain Vectors publicdomainvectors.org CC0
SVG Silh svgsilh.com CC0 silhouettes
Wikimedia Commons commons.wikimedia.org (filter SVG) Mixed (check each)
Vecteezy vecteezy.com Free w/ attribution + Pro
Freepik freepik.com Free w/ attribution + Premium
Pixabay / Openverse pixabay.com · openverse.org Free (CC), broad media search

Illustrations / characters

Source URL License
unDraw undraw.co Open, recolorable, no attribution
Humaaans humaaans.com Free, mix-and-match people
Open Peeps openpeeps.com CC0 hand-drawn people
Open Doodles opendoodles.com CC0 sketchy figures
DrawKit drawkit.com Free + paid
Blush blush.design Free + paid, customizable
Lukasz Adam lukaszadam.com Free illustration packs

Icons (clean, recolorable)

Source URL License
Lucide / Feather lucide.dev ISC
Tabler Icons tabler.io/icons MIT (~5k)
Phosphor phosphoricons.com MIT
Bootstrap Icons icons.getbootstrap.com MIT
Material Symbols fonts.google.com/icons Apache 2.0
The Noun Project thenounproject.com CC + paid
Game-icons.net game-icons.net CC BY 3.0, ~4k
Flaticon flaticon.com Freemium w/ attribution; millions
Iconfinder iconfinder.com Free + paid marketplace

Emoji / fun cutouts

Source URL License
OpenMoji openmoji.org CC BY-SA 4.0
Twemoji github.com/twitter/twemoji CC BY 4.0
Noto Emoji github.com/googlefonts/noto-emoji OFL/Apache

Patterns / textures / backgrounds

Source URL License
Hero Patterns heropatterns.com Free SVG tiles
SVG Backgrounds svgbackgrounds.com Free + paid

Stock marketplaces (paid, huge volume)

Source URL License
Shutterstock shutterstock.com Paid
Adobe Stock stock.adobe.com Paid
iStock / Getty istockphoto.com Paid
123RF 123rf.com Paid
Depositphotos depositphotos.com Paid
Dreamstime dreamstime.com Paid

Honorable mentions

Source URL License
Canva canva.com Built-in elements (in-editor)
Creazilla creazilla.com Free / freemium
Clipart Library clipart-library.com Free / freemium
PNGTree pngtree.com Freemium

Start here

Openclipart + SVG Repo (CC0, no attribution, infinite raw material) and unDraw / Humaaans (recolorable scenes & people to recombine).

Tip: SVGs are just XML — drop several into one <svg> canvas, recolor via fill, reposition with <g transform> instead of an editor.
